reviews.review_description: This game is a serious contender when it comes to AR/MR games. It’s super addicting and 110% worth the price. The fact that this game is on Horizon plus is a steal. I love playing this game with my friends and wife! It takes some time to get used to and understand how to really get good! Turning the music off and playing my own Spotify playlist hits different. If you’re an avid user of this game or someone just starting out, add @Dmoz and hmu! 5STARS

reviews.review_title: A garbage game that doesn’t work.
reviews.review_description:
This game shouldn’t be on Horizon+, there is zero multiplayer support or function and no option for single player, not even for general practice.

Basically this is a filler to make Horizon+ more appealing, but if the game isn’t even functional, what’s the point???

Absolute trash- do not waste your time or money.

First of all let me address the other reviews.. there Is single player mode where you fight bots! Admit the options are hard to see with this design. 
Secondly you jump first then fist bump upwards to jump higher. 
This game is so nice, I love the little touches I love the way you can make the area as big or small as you want. 
I'm a big fan of miniatures in MR games, I had fun playing it.
No idea how the devs can attract more players for online mode.
I enjoyed the game, I wish there was more rewards or something for single player... And I have to say..I LOVE THE COMMENTATOR!! 🤣

I'd love to give this 5 star, but the whole reason I wanted to get this was to play it was my friends. We all got it went through the tutorial tried to open a multiplayer game, and anytime one of us would invite the others, it would either freeze up and crash, or we would just sit alone in a lobby. Crazy that it's that hard to meet up. Why not just use roome codes like everyone else and keep it easy.
fun with other people online.
Is the future of games and have so much potential

I tried playing with my son and we couldn't get past the high jump tutorial. As we understood, you need to pull your arms up and pull the triggers at the same time but we couldn't get our guy to jump on the upper platform. Too bad, it looks fun.

developer_response.body: Just physically aim your arms up, you don't need to sync it. aim your aims up, and pull the trigger and you should dash in that direction. (without pressing the grip buttons, because that is for specific aiming)

reviews.review_description: Like so many others, I can't even get past the tutorial. It says to DASH UP to a higher platform using the punsh buttons, but it doesn't work. This game is broken and the devs doesn''t even care. Morons!!!
When I load in the game and in a server everyone started fighting and there are A LOT OF MINI GAMES! I love it so much! I recommend it to people who likes mini games and battling games.

reviews.review_title: Wam BAM I love you man
reviews.review_description: Absolutely love this MR game it’s the 1st I’ve played and I have trouble putting it down it’s very addictive I’m not a gamer at all never played Xbox or PlayStation I’m 49 yrs old  wow I love this game

reviews.review_title: So much fun! Detailed and beautiful!
reviews.review_description: Snagged this as a Quest+ offer and absolutely NOT disappointed! Visuals are top notch, gameplay is a blast. Just getting started, but so far so good! Can't wait to get home and play it more :)
This is a great 3rd person VR game. The only thing that I wish it had was a competitive league.
Little table looking thing appears in front of you. Some icons with Chinese writing. Little tiny robots appear. I didn’t understand. Even if I did. Seemed mixed reality in name only.

developer_response.body:
Everything is in English and Japanese as a second language.
The game has been localised in the meantime…

reviews.review_title: Great fun for a while, but lacks depth
reviews.review_description:
THE GOOD:

- It's instantly cute stylised fun

- It feels futuristic, like a solid hologram arena in front of you

THE BAD:

- The tutorial misses it's objective of clearly articulating how to control your bot and I found it frustrating

- There are a number of functions that SHOULD exist, mainly, the versus bots mode SHOULD have difficulty levels. Secondly, there SHOULD be clear goals that the player can anticipate (e.g. character 2 unlocks at level X). There is also no customisations (different colour body, styles, etc) for your character. It's missing even the most  basic function to adjust the music volume, instead it's either on or off!

BOTTOM LINE:

The game has wow factor when you first start playing it and is indeed much fun. However, it becomes repetitive after several hours, and the lack of a campaign/progression system means it's flame will just as quickly burn out.

The game is like a little robot fight in your house. Works well with both quest 2 and 3. And on top of that, if you have 2 or more people with a headset, you guys can do local play and essentially be able to use the same arena at the same time.

It also has online play to play with strangers. Which is good, butttt:

Developers, please add some kind of audio option. A lot of people who's playing right now have no idea how to really play the game. The tutorial you've added is good, but I believe that by allowing people to actually communicate while playing, it'll help a lot more people learn how to play the game through experience.

Im not even joking I'm pretty sure I'm THE best player playing right now. And the #1 thing I noticed is that after like 1 or 2 rounds people end up leaving. And I'm sure it's out of frustration and gap in skill level. I feel like giving people the ability to communicate will help create dialogue and strategies to grow as a player.

And maybe also add a leaderboard. It'd be pretty cool seeing myself as #1 amongst so many people. And who knows, that might also motivate people to reach competitive levels

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback and review!

reviews.review_title: The best mixed reality game yet!
reviews.review_description: This is easily the most fun mixed reality game so far for the Quest 3! I just wish more people would buy it and be online.

this game is fun asf and has alot of potential, in the future i hope they add a item shop for customization for the characters, i would indeed spend money on this game and i highly recommend playing it.
